pageContext.name: Ultraman Suit Taro the Animation
pageContext.description: Ultraman Suit Taro the Animation joins S.H.Figurarts! The second season of the popular series is set to stream on Netflix in April 2022. This figure brings anime-accurate proportions and posability to life!  Overseen by Tsuburaya Productions' LSS sculpting division, it faithfully captures the character's on-screen appearance with spectacular S.H.Figuarts posability at a standard size of 6.3'. As a bonus, the set includes option parts for the Ultraman the Animation figure (sold separately).[Set Contents]Main Body, Three left and four right optional hands, Optional Color Timer, Flame effect parts, Ultra Badge[Bonus Part]ULTRAMAN -the Animation- Ultra Slash effect parts(L/R), One set of optional hands for ULTRAMAN -the Animation
